package rulefixtures

import (
	"net/http"
)

// scenario for http_body_readall_without_limitreader: `io.ReadAll(req.Body)` in HTTP handlers without `io.LimitReader`
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: warning.
func scenario603Positive(urls []string) int {
	total := 0
	for _, url := range urls {
		client := &http.Client{}
		resp, err := client.Get(url)
		if err == nil { total += resp.StatusCode }
	}
	return total
}
